Markdown
# כל התורה כולה - Kol HaTorah Kulah Checklist

Interactive Hebrew checklist for tracking completion of Kol HaTorah Kulah based on Rav Chaim Kanievsky's yearly siyum cycle.

### Included
- תנ״ך (24)
- משנה (63) 
- תלמוד בבלי (37)
- תלמוד ירושלמי (39)
- מדרשי הלכה
- מדרשי אגדה
- זוהר
- רמב״ם משנה תורה (14)
- טור (4)
- שולחן ערוך (4)

### Features
- Click checkboxes to track progress
- Progress auto-saves to your browser
- Expand All / Collapse All / Print / Clear Progress
- Fully offline after first load

### Live Site
https://yourusername.github.io/kol-hatorah-checklist/

# כל התורה כולה - Kol HaTorah Kulah Checklist

Interactive Hebrew checklist for tracking completion of Kol HaTorah Kulah based on Rav Chaim Kanievsky's yearly siyum cycle.

### Included
- תנ״ך (24)
- משנה (63)
